allow: Bash(echo '<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 32 32"><circle cx="16" cy="16" r="14" fill="#C94A6E"/><text x="50%" y="55%" font-family="Inter,sans-serif" font-size="12" font-weight="800" fill="white" text-anchor="middle" dominant-baseline="middle">G</text></svg>')

Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\),p=require\('path'\);function w\(d\){return fs.readdirSync\(d\).flatMap\(n=>{const f=p.join\(d,n\);return fs.statSync\(f\).isDirectory\(\)?w\(f\):[f]}\)}const files=[...w\('./src'\),'./index.html'];let ok=true;files.forEach\(f=>{if\(fs.readFileSync\(f,'utf8'\).includes\('—'\)\){console.log\('FAIL:',f\);ok=false}}\);if\(ok\)console.log\('No em dashes. Clean.'\);")
